message:
bd-1kwk4: Add timeout + kill for setup installer

- Add INSTALL_TIMEOUT_MS constant (5 min default, env-configurable)
- Implement Promise.race pattern with timeout for install spawns
- Kill process on timeout and emit "failed" status with clear message
- Follows existing patterns from apr.service.ts, pt.service.ts, etc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
